positive: A stylized, minimalist jungle scene featuring abstract tropical flora and fauna. Focus on strong silhouettes of exotic leaves, stylized parrots, and meandering vines, presented in a vibrant, continuous pattern repeat suitable for apparel. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of emerald green, turquoise, burnt orange, and deep indigo. The composition should be balanced and highly symmetrical, with clean edges and visible negative space, evoking a blend of Art Deco geometry and lush tropical life. Flat vector illustration style, clean lines, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, noisy, ugly, poorly rendered hands, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, grain, smudge, photorealistic, 3d, excessive detail, cluttered, monochrome
